category_sources: Official GTK documentation describes GTK as the primary library used to construct user interfaces.
source_facts.description says GTK is a toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces.
display_name_sources: Official GTK website and API documentation use GTK branding.
source_facts.name gtk4 identifies the Homebrew formula variant for GTK 4.
docs_sources: Official GTK API documentation for GTK 4 is hosted at docs.gtk.org/gtk4/.
Official gtk.org docs page is the project documentation entry point.
repo_sources: Official GTK API documentation lists the source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gtk/.
tags_sources: Official GTK docs describe widgets, user interface controls, and GNOME-hosted source.
